name: TESSENKA NO MAI (DANCE OF THE CLEMATIS)

description.value:
This technique is the fourth dance of the Kaguya style, and was made forbidden due to its extremely dangerous nature to the user. When using this technique, you can produce one of two highly advanced bone weapons:

Vine: You pull out your spine, which turns into a bone weapon one size larger than you that counts as both a bone weapon and a spiked chain. It has a reach of 15 ft, but can be used to attack adjacent opponents as well, and will deal triple damage on a critical hit. When creating the Vine, you are immediately @Condition[paralyzed]{paralyzed} for 1 minute, and @Condition[fatigued]{fatigued} for 1 hour afterwards (Fortitude DC 15 negates both). You can only create one Vine every 24 hours, and it crumbles to dust after 6 hours (as a normal bone weapon).

Flower: You focus power into one of your arms, extracting a bone of superior thickness and density. The extracted weapon is a Colossal size bone weapon (4d6 damage, 18-20/x2 critical). If you were of a Large size when using this technique, it deals 5d6 damage instead. The Flower lasts 1 round per level, and leaves the used arm completely unusable for 1 hour (as per the Bone Weapon ability).
